rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 230px; height: 165px; padding-top: 10px; margin-left: 10px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; width: 228px; height: 165px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; width: 100%; height: 100%; white-space: nowrap;
div.p:
- userNames : Map<string, User {list}>
- groupNames : Map<string, Group {list}>
- pageTitles : Map<string, Page {list>
- posts : Map<string, Post {list>
